calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes and Susan Squirres for Emily Bagatelos.

The Court expressed concern stating that the loan to the Trust was not proper, that it's really a distribution and that it is an action that will not be approved as part of the final distribution. Counsel presented oral argument to support her position with respect to the loan and addressed how her fees are being paid. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
